JUDGE DAVID BALLATI; RPTR SUSAN LEE; CLK C CARSWELL CASE CALLED FOR CONT'G JURY TRIAL. PLTF PRESENT W CNSL JASON POLLACK. DEFT PRESENT W CNSL PAMALA MATSUMOTO. ROLL TAKEN OF PROSP JURORS. CNL VOIR DIRE, PASS FOR CAUSE AND EXERCISE PEREMPT CHALLENGES.12 JURORS AND 2 ALT JURORS ARE SWORN. CT READS PRELM INSTRUCTNS TO JURY. PLTF PRESENTS WITN & DOCM EVID. CONT TO 9:30 5/7/98 FOR CONT OF PLTF CASE.

JUDGE DAVID BALLATI; RPTR DIANA PADILLA; CLK C CARSWELL CASE CALLED FOR CONT'G JURY TRIAL. ALL 12 JURORS PLUS 2 ALTS PRESENT. PLTF PRESENT W CNSL POLLACK. DEFT PRESENT W CNSL MATSUMOTO. PLTF RESTS. DEFT PRESENTS WITN & DOCMT EVID. DEFT RESTS. PLTF PRESENTS REBUTTAL WITN. BOTH SIDES MAKE CLOSING STATEMENTS. CT INSTRUCTS JURY. BAILIFF IS SWORN & TAKES JURY TO DELIBERATE. JURY DOES NOT REACH A VERDICT & WILL RETURN 9:30 5/8/98 FOR FURTHER DELIB.

JUDGE DAVID BALLATI; RPTR DIANA PADILLA; CLK C CARSWELL CASE CALLED FOR CONT'G JURY TRIAL. 12 JURORS RESUME THEIR DELIBERATIONS. TWO ALT JURORS ARE ADMONISHED NOT TO DISCUSS OR DELIB IN ANY WAY AND ARE PUT ON PHONE STANDBY TO BE NOTIFIED TODAY IF THEIR SERVICE IS COMPLETED OR THEY MUST RETURN ON MONDAY. JURY RETURNS SPECIAL VERDICT FINDING: DEFT WAS NEGLIGENT; SUCH NEGLIGENCE CAUSE DAMAGE TO PLTF; TOTAL AMT OF DAMAGES SUFFERED BY PLTF IS $2217; NEGLIGENCE OF PLTF DID CAUSE DAMAGE TO SUCH PLTF; PLTF CONTRIB 20% OF DAMAGE TO PLTF & DEFT CAUSE 80% OF IT. VERDICT IS READ & JURY POLLED AS TO EACH QUESTION. PLTF WILL PREPARE JUDGMENT & MAY SUBMIT COST BILL SUBJ TO AFFIDAVIT. EXHIBITS ARE RETAINED.
